summary: Verified demo data 'Swathi 60L G+2' project displays correctly across all dashboards after fixing seed data issues

minor.issue: Leads missing current_stage_id and stage_type fields - FIXED during testing
Payment stages missing amount_received values - FIXED during testing
Site engineer assignment missing is_active field - FIXED during testing

ui_bugs.issue: Stage names not displaying, only showing numbers 1-9

action_items: Update seed_demo_data.py to include current_stage_id and stage_type fields for leads
Update seed_demo_data.py to set amount_received in payment_stages
Update seed_demo_data.py to set is_active=True in site_engineer_assignments
Fix Project Stages tab to display stage names instead of just numbers
critical_code_review_comments: Seed script creates income in 'income' collection but dashboard reads from 'payment_stages.amount_received' - data model inconsistency
Leads require both stage_id and current_stage_id/stage_type fields for proper filtering in CRM boards
test_credentials: Demo Access buttons on login page - Super Admin, Sales, Site Engineer, Accountant, Planning, etc.
seed_data_creation: Fixed seed data issues: added current_stage_id/stage_type to leads, amount_received to payment_stages, is_active to SE assignments
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo data 'Swathi 60L G+2' project is now correctly displayed. Key fixes applied: 1) Leads need current_stage_id and stage_type fields, 2) Payment stages need amount_received values, 3) Site engineer assignments need is_active=True. All dashboards verified working: Super Admin (60L value, 30L income, 30L balance), Sales CRM (3 leads), Site Engineer (1 project assigned), Accounts Board (5 income entries), Planning Board (1 request), Project Detail (12 stages, 3 work orders).

verified_features.super_admin_dashboard: Shows project with correct financials (60L value, 30L income, 30L balance)
verified_features.sales_crm_board: Shows 3 sales leads (Swathi, Priya, Mohan) in correct stages
verified_features.site_engineer_dashboard: Shows 1 assigned project with 4 active orders
verified_features.planning_board: Shows 1 under construction project, 1 material request
verified_features.project_detail_page: Shows project info, 12 stages (4 completed), 3 work orders
